Domsdatabasen.short_description: Danish court judgments from the Domsdatabasen database, covering decisions from various Danish courts. Public sector legal documents published under Danish Copyright Law §9.
style_hints: structured court judgment format with findings and rulings
legal prose with citations and statutory references

adl.short_description: Digitized Danish literary texts from the Archive of Danish Literature (Arkiv for Dansk Litteratur), covering canonical works across multiple centuries.
style_hints: varied register from classical to modern Danish
formal and expressive language with rich vocabulary

ai-aktindsigt.short_description: Municipality website scrapes collected for the AI-aktindsigt project, with broad public-service topics.

botxt.short_description: Bornholmsk dialect literary texts, containing fiction and prose written in the Bornholmsk regional dialect of Danish.
style_hints: regional dialect prose with non-standard orthography
short to medium fiction and descriptive texts

cellar.short_description: EU legal and legislative documents from the Publications Office of the European Union's CELLAR repository, covering regulations, directives, and official texts in Danish.
style_hints: technical legal language with numbered articles

dannet.short_description: Entries from DanNet, the Danish lexical database and wordnet, providing definitions, synsets, and semantic relations for Danish vocabulary.

danske-taler.short_description: Curated Danish public speeches from dansketaler.dk, spanning historical and contemporary contexts.

depbank.short_description: Source texts from the PAROLE-DK Danish dependency treebank (1998), comprising news articles and other written texts annotated for linguistic analysis.
style_hints: journalistic news prose from the late 1990s

enevaeldens_nyheder.short_description: Historical Danish and Norwegian newspapers from the absolutism era (1660–1849), digitized from the Royal Library's collections.
style_hints: archaic historical Danish and Norwegian orthography
early newspaper prose with varied topics

ep.short_description: Danish-language proceedings from the European Parliament (Europarl corpus), covering plenary session debates and speeches.
style_hints: EU institutional register with procedural language

eur-lex-sum-da.short_description: Danish-language summaries of EU legislation from EUR-Lex, covering regulations, directives, and legal acts with concise official abstracts.
style_hints: structured summary format with purpose and scope

fm-udgivelser.short_description: Publications from the Danish Ministry of Finance (Finansministeriet), including policy documents, budget analyses, and official reports.
style_hints: formal government policy and financial reporting

ft.short_description: Parliament transcripts from Folketinget with post-edited ASR text and policy-oriented proceedings.

grundtvig.short_description: Collected works of N.F.S. Grundtvig, the influential 19th-century Danish writer, theologian, and educational reformer.
style_hints: varied genres including sermons, poetry, and historical writing

gutenberg.short_description: Public-domain Danish-language literary texts from Project Gutenberg, spanning multiple genres and historical periods.
style_hints: varied literary prose from historical periods

health_hovedstaden.short_description: Health information web content from the Capital Region of Denmark (Region Hovedstaden), covering patient information, medical procedures, and public health guidance.
style_hints: structured informational pages with procedure descriptions

jvj.short_description: Complete works of Johannes V. Jensen, the Danish Nobel Prize-winning author, including novels, essays, and poetry from the early 20th century.
style_hints: modernist literary prose with distinctive style
narrative and descriptive with rich imagery
varied registers across fiction, essay, and lyric forms

kb_administrative_publication.short_description: Administrative publications digitized from the collections of the Royal Danish Library (Kongelige Bibliotek), covering public reports, official documents, and institutional texts.

kb_historical_letters.short_description: Historical letters and correspondence digitized from the collections of the Royal Danish Library, spanning multiple centuries of Danish epistolary heritage.
style_hints: varied from intimate to official correspondence

memo.short_description: Canonical Danish novels from 1870–1899, selected as part of the MeMo project to represent the golden age of Danish fiction.
style_hints: formal and expressive classical Danish style

miljoeportalen.short_description: Public environmental portal content from Danish authorities, often technical and document-like.

municipality_meetings.short_description: Committee meeting records from 5 Danish municipalities, covering city council and environmental/technical committee minutes from 2014 onwards.
style_hints: structured meeting minutes with decision sections

naat.short_description: Transcribed spoken Danish content including accessible audio descriptions and broadcast narration.

ncc_books.short_description: Danish books extracted from the Norwegian Colossal Corpus via OCR, sourced from the National Library of Norway's digitized collections. Covers a wide range of historical and contemporary Danish literature.
style_hints: OCR-derived text with occasional recognition errors

ncc_maalfrid.short_description: Danish-language content scraped from Norwegian institutional websites, extracted from the Målfrid collection within the Norwegian Colossal Corpus.

ncc_newspaper.short_description: OCR-scanned historical Danish newspaper articles drawn from the Norwegian Colossal Corpus, sourced from the National Library of Norway's digitized newspaper archive.

ncc_parliament.short_description: Historical Danish-language proceedings from the Norwegian Parliament (Stortinget), OCR-scanned from digitized documents in the Norwegian Colossal Corpus.

nordjyllandnews.short_description: Regional Danish news articles from TV2 Nord derived from the Nordjylland summarization corpus.

nota.short_description: Danish accessible books from Nota, the Danish library for people with print disabilities, covering a wide range of literary and non-fiction genres.

opensubtitles.short_description: Danish subtitles from films and TV shows, drawn from the OpenSubtitles corpus. Represents colloquial spoken Danish as rendered in screen dialogue.

relig.short_description: Danish religious texts spanning 1700–2022, primarily a Danish translation of the Bible from the Massively Parallel Bible corpus.

retsinformationdk.short_description: Official Danish legal information system containing legislation, administrative regulations, executive orders, preparatory legislative works, and case law references.
style_hints: formal official Danish with citations and cross-references

retspraksis.short_description: Danish court judgments and case law from the Retspraksis legal database, covering decisions from 2000–2022 across Danish courts including the Supreme Court.
style_hints: precise legal argumentation and ruling language

skat.short_description: Content from the Danish tax authority website (skat.dk), including practical tax information and decisions.
style_hints: practical guidance for citizens and businesses

tidsskrift-dk.short_description: Danish open-access academic journal articles from the Royal Danish Library's tidsskrift.dk portal, covering diverse scholarly disciplines.
style_hints: structured article format with section headers

tv2r.short_description: Contemporary Danish newswire from TV 2 regional outlets, covering local events and entities.

wiki.short_description: Danish-language Wikipedia articles covering a broad range of topics, extracted from Wikimedia database dumps.

wiki_misc.short_description: Miscellaneous Danish Wikipedia content not covered by the main wiki subset, including supplementary articles and auxiliary pages.

wikibooks.short_description: Educational and instructional texts from the Danish section of Wikibooks, covering diverse subjects in a structured format.

wikisource.short_description: Literary and historical texts from the Danish subsection of Wikisource, including public-domain works and cultural heritage documents.
style_hints: varied register from old to modern Danish
